steps.title: Set up the triangle equation
steps.content:
Use the Pythagorean theorem. One leg is $39.6$, the hypotenuse is $180.4$, and the other leg is $b$.
$$39.6^2+b^2=180.4^2$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing leg
steps.content:
Square the known side lengths and subtract.
$$1568.16+b^2=32544.16$$
$$b^2=30976$$
$$b=176$$
The answer is C.
